criteria_results.criterion: Migration 017 schema: activity_log table with correct columns (id, workspace_id, user_id, action enum, entity_type, entity_id, entity_name, details JSONB, created_at)
criteria_results.evidence: supabase/migrations/017_activity_log.sql lines 22-32 define CREATE TABLE activity_log with all 9 required columns. Details column is JSONB. created_at uses TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now().

criteria_results.criterion: activity_action enum includes: created, updated, deleted, completed, assigned, commented, exported, shared
criteria_results.evidence: Migration line 6-15 defines CREATE TYPE activity_action AS ENUM with exactly those 8 values. src/types/database.ts line 310 mirrors the same 8 values in ActivityAction type.

criteria_results.criterion: RLS policies: SELECT + INSERT only via can_access_workspace(), no UPDATE/DELETE
criteria_results.evidence: Migration lines 44-48 define exactly 2 policies: activity_log_select (SELECT ... USING can_access_workspace) and activity_log_insert (INSERT ... WITH CHECK can_access_workspace). No UPDATE or DELETE policies exist.

criteria_results.criterion: Index on (workspace_id, created_at DESC) for efficient pagination
criteria_results.evidence: Migration line 35: CREATE INDEX idx_activity_log_workspace ON activity_log(workspace_id, created_at DESC) — exactly matches spec.

criteria_results.criterion: ActivityLog type in database.ts matches migration schema
criteria_results.evidence: src/types/database.ts lines 312-322 define interface ActivityLog with id:string, workspace_id:string, user_id:string, action:ActivityAction, entity_type:string, entity_id:string, entity_name:string, details:Record<string,unknown>|null, created_at:string — all 9 migration columns matched.

criteria_results.criterion: API route GET /api/v1/activity: workspace_id required, supports user_id/action/entity_type/from/to/limit/offset filters
criteria_results.evidence: src/app/api/v1/activity/route.ts: workspace_id validated at line 14 (returns 400 if missing). All 7 filter params parsed (user_id, action, entity_type, from, to, limit, offset). Limit defaults to 50, offset to 0. All conditionally applied to query.

criteria_results.criterion: API route returns paginated results with correct envelope format
criteria_results.evidence: activity/route.ts line 63: return successResponse(entries) — uses the standard successResponse envelope. Pagination via .range(offset, offset + limit - 1). Ordered by created_at DESC.

criteria_results.criterion: logActivity() utility in lib/api/activity.ts: fire-and-forget pattern (no await, catches errors silently)
criteria_results.evidence: lib/api/activity.ts: async function logActivity() — always called without await in route handlers (e.g., steps/route.ts line 88: bare call; comments/route.ts line 123: void logActivity). Errors caught internally with console.error rather than thrown. NOTE: some routes omit void keyword (bare logActivity call) — functionally equivalent fire-and-forget but lint may warn in future.

criteria_results.criterion: logActivity() accepts workspace_id, user_id, action, entity_type, entity_id, entity_name, optional details
criteria_results.evidence: lib/api/activity.ts lines 4-13: LogActivityParams interface defines all 8 required fields (supabase, workspace_id, user_id, action, entity_type, entity_id, entity_name) plus optional details:Record<string,unknown>.

criteria_results.criterion: Activity page UI at /w/[workspaceId]/activity: page.tsx server component + activity-view.tsx client component
criteria_results.evidence: src/app/(app)/w/[workspaceId]/activity/page.tsx is async server component (no 'use client'). activity-view.tsx has 'use client' directive at line 1. Both files confirmed present.

criteria_results.criterion: Activity view: chronological feed with action type filter tabs
criteria_results.evidence: activity-view.tsx lines 84-111: renders 9 filter tabs (All + 8 action types). Entries ordered by created_at DESC (server-sorted). Filtered via React.useMemo on activeFilter state.

criteria_results.criterion: Activity view: entity links, relative timestamps, Load More pagination
criteria_results.evidence: activity-view.tsx: Link component at line 138 for entity navigation. formatRelativeTime() at line 34 renders relative timestamps. Load More button at lines 163-173 calls loadMore() with offset:entries.length. hasMore based on length === 50.

criteria_results.criterion: Sidebar nav includes Activity item with correct icon and path
criteria_results.evidence: sidebar.tsx line 44: { label: 'Activity', icon: Clock, href: '/activity' } — present in NAV_ITEMS array. Clock icon from lucide-react matches activity-view.tsx header icon.

criteria_results.criterion: workspace-shell.tsx reserved paths includes 'activity'
criteria_results.evidence: workspace-shell.tsx line 47: [...'runbooks', 'activity'] in the reserved paths array used to distinguish named routes from tab IDs. Activity URL segment won't be treated as a tabId.

criteria_results.criterion: logActivity() integrated in POST handlers (spot-check: workspaces, steps, sections, connections, comments, tasks, runbooks)
criteria_results.evidence: grep for logActivity across src/app/api: 39 route files confirmed. Spot-checked: steps/route.ts (POST), comments/route.ts (POST with action:commented), workspaces/route.ts (POST), sections/route.ts (POST), connections/route.ts (POST), tasks/route.ts (POST), runbooks/route.ts (POST).

criteria_results.criterion: logActivity() integrated in PATCH handlers (spot-check: workspaces, steps, sections, runbooks, runbook-steps)
criteria_results.evidence: runbooks/[id]/route.ts PATCH uses action = updates.status==='completed' ? 'completed' : 'updated'. runbook-steps/[id]/route.ts PATCH uses async IIFE pattern for parent chain traversal. All 5 spot-check PATCH routes confirmed.

criteria_results.criterion: logActivity() integrated in DELETE handlers (spot-check: workspaces, steps, sections, connections, comments, tasks)
criteria_results.evidence: All 6 spot-check DELETE route files confirmed in the 39-file grep result. runbooks/[id]/route.ts DELETE line 116: void logActivity action:deleted.

criteria_results.criterion: Special actions: comments POST uses 'commented', runbooks PATCH to completed uses 'completed', shares POST uses 'shared'
criteria_results.evidence: comments/route.ts line 123: action:'commented'. runbooks/[id]/route.ts line 83: action = updates.status==='completed' ? 'completed' : 'updated'. shares/route.ts line 64: action:'shared'.

criteria_results.criterion: Entities without direct workspace_id (roles, people, step-roles, annotations, runbook-steps) use async IIFE for parent chain traversal
criteria_results.evidence: roles/route.ts: async IIFE fetches team→workspace_id before logging. runbook-steps/[id]/route.ts: async IIFE fetches runbook→workspace_id. Pattern confirmed in 2 spot-checks.

criteria_results.criterion: Client wrapper fetchActivityLog() in lib/api/client.ts with correct typing
criteria_results.evidence: lib/api/client.ts lines 654-672: fetchActivityLog(workspaceId, filters?) returns Promise<ActivityLog[]>. All 7 filter params supported. Uses apiFetch<ActivityLog[]> following established pattern. ActivityLog and ActivityAction imported from @/types/database.

criteria_results.criterion: /login renders (200)
criteria_results.evidence: src/app/(auth)/login/ directory exists. Auth routes confirmed. TypeScript compilation passes (0 errors). Static analysis confirms page structure is valid.

criteria_results.criterion: /workspaces redirects unauthed (307→login)
criteria_results.evidence: src/middleware.ts auth guard present (confirmed in CLAUDE.md). All workspace pages have createClient() + getUser() + redirect('/login') pattern (verified in activity/page.tsx and other pages).

criteria_results.criterion: Canvas tab loads with nodes (static analysis)
criteria_results.evidence: [tabId]/canvas-view.tsx confirmed present. Imports FlowCanvas, StepDetailPanel, SectionDetailPanel. journey-canvas-view.tsx confirmed with StageDetailPanel and TouchpointDetailPanel imports.

criteria_results.criterion: Step detail panel opens on node click
criteria_results.evidence: canvas-view.tsx line 197: StepDetailPanel rendered conditionally on selectedStep state. Panel open/close logic confirmed via imports and rendering.

criteria_results.criterion: Journey canvas renders with stages/touchpoints
criteria_results.evidence: journey-canvas-view.tsx: StageDetailPanel at line 584, TouchpointDetailPanel at line 592. Stage and touchpoint nodes built via buildJourneyCanvasNodes() and buildJourneyCanvasEdges().

criteria_results.criterion: Gap analysis view renders
criteria_results.evidence: gap-analysis-view.tsx: GapAnalysisView exported function at line 33. loading.tsx present. page.tsx server component fetches data and passes to GapAnalysisView.

criteria_results.criterion: Comparison view renders
criteria_results.evidence: compare-view.tsx: CompareView exported at line 248. Side-by-side canvas comparison with process + journey canvases. PDF export capability via importComparisonPdf.

criteria_results.criterion: Dashboard page renders
criteria_results.evidence: dashboard-view.tsx: DashboardView exported at line 64. page.tsx and dashboard-view.tsx both confirmed present.

criteria_results.criterion: Teams/People/Tools pages render with search/filter
criteria_results.evidence: teams-view.tsx, people-view.tsx, tools-view.tsx all confirmed present. All 3 pages have dedicated page.tsx server components.

criteria_results.criterion: Comments system: panel, badges, workspace view, category filter
criteria_results.evidence: comments-view.tsx: CATEGORY_CONFIG with Badge variants, category filter tabs (lines 68+), filtered display via activeFilter state. CommentPanel and comment-panel.tsx confirmed present in components/panels/.

criteria_results.criterion: Tasks system: panel, badges, section rollup
criteria_results.evidence: section-detail-panel.tsx lines 117-120: task rollup calculates totalTasksCompleted and totalTasksCount across all steps in section. task-panel.tsx confirmed present.

criteria_results.criterion: Runbooks: list view, detail view, 4-state step status, Complete/Cancel dialogs
criteria_results.evidence: runbooks-list-view.tsx confirmed. runbook-view.tsx: 4 statuses (pending/in_progress/completed/skipped) at lines 32-44. confirmCompleteOpen and confirmCancelOpen dialogs at lines 61-62. Dialog component imported.

criteria_results.criterion: Playbook mode: step-by-step execution, Skip button, progress bar, dot navigation
criteria_results.evidence: playbook-view.tsx: progressPct at line 37, Skip button at line 205-208, dot navigation referenced at line 239, prev/next navigation at line 213. handleSkip() at line 77 with auto-advance logic.

criteria_results.criterion: Activity page: renders with filter tabs and pagination
criteria_results.evidence: activity-view.tsx: 9 filter tabs (All + 8 actions), Load More button with loading state. page.tsx server component fetches initial 50 entries, passes entityTabMap for navigation links.

criteria_results.criterion: Type check passes (npx tsc --noEmit)
criteria_results.evidence: npx tsc --noEmit run at 2026-03-03: 0 errors, 0 output. Clean compilation.

criteria_results.criterion: Lint passes (npm run lint)
criteria_results.evidence: npm run lint: 0 errors, 1 pre-existing warning (addEdge unused in flow-canvas.tsx) — known acceptable per BUILD_RESULT verification notes.

criteria_results.criterion: No new TypeScript errors introduced
criteria_results.evidence: tsc --noEmit: 0 errors total. All 39 logActivity-integrated route files compile cleanly.

criteria_results.criterion: API auth guards return 401 for unauthenticated requests
criteria_results.evidence: workspaces/route.ts: errorResponse('unauthorized','Not authenticated',401) at lines 11 and 49. steps/route.ts: same pattern at lines 11 and 46. activity/route.ts: same pattern at line 9-11. Pattern consistent across all routes (createClient+getUser+!user check).

bugs_found.description: logActivity() called without void keyword in several routes (steps/route.ts, connections/route.ts, workspaces/route.ts, etc.). While functionally fire-and-forget, omitting void creates an unhandled Promise that will produce ESLint @typescript-eslint/no-floating-promises warnings when that rule is enabled. The pattern is inconsistent: some routes (comments, runbooks) correctly use `void logActivity()` while others use bare `logActivity()`. Currently passes lint only because @typescript-eslint/no-floating-promises is not enabled.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Search for bare 'logActivity(' in src/app/api without preceding 'void' or 'await' 2. Compare steps/route.ts (bare) vs comments/route.ts (void). 3. Enable no-floating-promises rule to expose violations.

bugs_found.description: Activity entries display user_id.slice(0,8) as the author identifier (line 152) rather than the user's name or email. This is a data display limitation — the activity page fetches activity_log rows but does not join users table to retrieve display names. Users see a UUID fragment instead of a recognizable author.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Create some activity (add a step, comment, etc.) 2. Navigate to /w/[id]/activity 3. Observe author field shows UUID prefix (e.g., 'a3f2b1c0') not a name.

improvements_found.observation: Activity entries show raw entity_type values (e.g., 'steps', 'sections') as the badge label. These are snake_case DB table names. A human-readable mapping (e.g., 'steps' → 'Step', 'runbook_steps' → 'Runbook Step') would improve clarity.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H1: Visibility of system status — system state should be expressed in user language
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add an ENTITY_TYPE_LABELS map similar to ACTION_LABELS and apply it to the entity type badge in the entry renderer.

improvements_found.observation: The Load More button shows 'Loading...' during fetch but there is no skeleton or placeholder for the expected new items below. Users may not know if more content is coming.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H1: Visibility of system status — feedback during loading operations
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add 2-3 skeleton activity row placeholders below the Load More button when loading=true, replacing the static 'Loading...' text.

improvements_found.observation: Activity filter tabs are scrollable horizontally (overflow-x-auto) but there is no visual affordance (fade gradient on the right) to indicate more tabs exist. On smaller sidebars users may not discover the full filter list.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H7: Flexibility and efficiency of use — progressive disclosure with visual cues
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add a right-side fade gradient overlay on the filter tab container when scroll is possible.

improvements_found.observation: Author displayed as user_id.slice(0,8) — while this is a data limitation (noted as bug P2), even as a temporary display it should be in a more distinctive style (e.g., badge or mono chip) to signal it's an identifier rather than a name.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H4: Consistency and standards — identifiers should look like identifiers
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Already in font-mono — could add a user icon prefix or a person pill badge style.

improvements_found.observation: 39 API route files integrate logActivity(), but the implementation doesn't distinguish between user-initiated actions and automated/system actions (e.g., status auto-transitions). Future accessibility of audit trail may require actor_type field to distinguish human vs automated actions.
improvements_found.design_principle: Design for context and traceability — audit logs should be auditable
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Consider adding optional actor_type:'user'|'system' to LogActivityParams in a future migration.

notes: Playwright browser unavailable — Chrome opened in existing session and exited. Full static analysis performed as rigor substitute: 19 regression baseline checks + 20 FEAT-049 acceptance criteria verified via source code, migration SQL, type definitions, and TypeScript/lint tool execution. TypeScript: 0 errors. Lint: 0 errors (1 pre-existing warning). All structural checks pass. Browser-level runtime verification (actual page loads, console errors, layout checks) was not possible. The BUILD_RESULT_1.json in knowledge/handoffs is from iteration 94 (FEAT-050 clone workspace) — those files (migration 018, clone route, cloneWorkspace client function) are NOT yet merged to the current branch ralph/init-stride, which is at iteration 90/91. This is expected for testing-only iteration 91.
